title: Blood N' Bones
description: A Modpack inspired by RLCRAFT and various others
body:
A Modpack Inspired By RLCraft

Blood N' Bones is a fabric modpack which brings new difficulties and challenges to over come

bringing in new biomes, mobs, and dimensions

Vanilla mobs get an overhaul, granting them new strengths and abilities

World Generation greatly changed by the Tectonic mod, along with dimension overhauls brought by Better Nether and Better End, 

A new discoverable dimension that can be found in the depths of the deep dark

Hundreds of new items, new tools and armor

and multiplayer brought to you via Essential.
